description.ko: 퇴적층과 광물 맥을 통해 수백만 년의 역사를 보여주는 대지의 지형적 서사.
description.en: A topographic narrative of the land, showcasing millions of years of history through sedimentary layers and mineral veins.

prompt: Hyper-realistic satellite photography of TERRA-1, titled 'The Lithic Ledger.' A top-down macro perspective of a canyon wall where #8B4513 sienna and #D2691E ochre sedimentary layers reveal geological history. Deep #2F4F4F slate mineral veins cut through the rock like frozen lightning. Sharp #F4A460 sand drifts fill the crevices. Tactile texture showing grain-level detail, cinematic natural lighting, 8k resolution.
